top_signals.title: Trump Hails Qatar Meetings on Iran as Talks to Continue
top_signals.summary: US President Donald Trump said negotiators had made progress in indirect talks with Iran to move past last week’s tit-for-tat strikes and convert their interim truce into a lasting peace. Bloomberg's Stuart Livingstone-Wallace has the latest updates. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Olympia developer: Britain’s planning system doesn’t reward delivery
top_signals.summary: Property hotshot John Hitchcox tells us about his career, from doing up flats in his 20s to leading the £1.3bn regeneration of Olympia London.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. won’t renew USMCA, opening door for negotiations with Canada and Mexico
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump's "primary" issue with USMCA centers on America's trade deficits with Canada and Mexico, a senior administration official said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
